doctor_turn: What brings you in today?

patient_turn: No.

doctor_turn: How long have you had eczema for?
patient_turn: Oh, like when I was, started when I was like a kid and then I feel like when I was a teenager I didn't really, and then part of it as an adult I really have to take care of it or else it gets bad.

doctor_turn: Have you ever been hospitalized or have you had any surgeries in the past?
patient_turn: Uh, like when I was first diagnosed with Crohn's maybe 20 years ago, when I was like 20, I was in the hospital for a little bit 'cause I was really dehydrated and I couldn't really like, I just couldn't I wasn't feeling well at that time, but since then I've been pretty on top of it.

doctor_turn: Are there any other medications that you're on?
